title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter and Sign Into a Memorandum of Agreement with Doh-accredited Hospitals, Pharmacies and Laboratories for the Referral of Patients or Clients Who May Need Health Services Not Available in the Health Facilities of Los Baños Municipal Health Office. Author Councilor Mark Lester B. Dizon, 11/29/2021)
